title: PSG LOGIN
description: Best Minecraft login plugin for cracked servers with AntiBot, 2FA, and advanced security.
body:
🔐 PSGLogin – Best Minecraft Login Plugin (AntiBot + 2FA + Security)

PSGLogin is one of the best Minecraft login plugins for cracked servers, built for Spigot, Paper, and Purpur. It provides advanced protection against bots, brute-force attacks, and unauthorized access while maintaining high performance.

A modern alternative to plugins like AuthMe Reloaded, nLogin, and LuxAuth.

🚀 Why PSGLogin?                                                                                                           
🛡️ Advanced Anti-Bot Protection 
🔐 Secure BCrypt Password Hashing
🔑 Built-in Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
⚡ Fully async & optimized performance
📊 Supports SQLite & MySQL (HikariCP)
🎨 Fully customizable UI (BossBar, Titles, ActionBar) 
🔑 Features
🔐 Authentication System
BCrypt hashing (configurable cost)
Constant-time comparison (anti timing attacks)
Password strength validation
Unsafe password blacklist
Password reuse prevention
🛡️ Anti-Bot & Security
IP-based rate limiting
Join spam protection
Automatic IP bans
Account lock system
Brute-force protection
QR code generation
Recovery codes
Secure TOTP system
⚡ Performance
Fully async database operations
Optimized for high player counts
Low CPU & memory usage
🎨 Customization
BossBar login timer
Titles & ActionBar messages
Sounds & placeholders
Fully configurable messages
📊 Database Support
SQLite (default)
MySQL with connection pooling
Auto table creation
SQL injection safe
🆚 Why Choose PSGLogin?
Better performance than many auth plugins
Built-in anti-bot system (no extra plugins needed)
Modern codebase (no outdated APIs)
Easy setup and configuration
🎮 Commands
/login, /register, /logout
/changepassword, /unregister
/2fa enable, /2fa disable
Admin management commands
🎯 Perfect For
Cracked Minecraft servers
Lifesteal & PvP servers
SMP servers
High-traffic public networks
📦 Installation
Place PSGLogin.jar in /plugins/
Start server
Configure files
Done ✅
🔗 Links
Discord: https://discord.gg/HutcT9w9AB
⚠️ Note
🌐 Setup Guide
https://psglogin.netlify.app/
  

👉 Visit this website to get the full plugin guide:
This plugin includes real backend security systems.
Misconfiguration may reduce protection.
